waiver.reason_summary: Gate failures are pre-existing on main and unrelated to these two commits
waiver.detail: Commits 349b4c36f and 273f798b3 add the adr-0347-0358 workstream YAML (carried forward from epic-liskov) and fix pre-existing YAML lint errors (duplicate keys in versions/stack.yaml and two workstream files). All failures in this gate run (agent-standards, ansible-lint, ansible-syntax, dependency-graph, generated-docs, generated-portals, integration-tests, schema-validation, semgrep-sast, service-completeness, workstream-surfaces) are pre-existing on main. yaml-lint PASSED with my fixes. No new regressions introduced.
substitute_evidence: yaml-lint passed in this gate run
